properties.name: solon.cloud.nimbus-conf.server
properties.description: 服务地址 127.0.0.1:8080，多个用逗号分隔

properties.name: solon.cloud.nimbus-conf.username
properties.description: nimbus-config 服务连接用户名，默认为空

properties.name: solon.cloud.nimbus-conf.password
properties.description: nimbus-config 服务连接密码，默认为空

properties.name: solon.cloud.nimbus-conf.config.enable
properties.description: nimbus-config 服务是否启用默认true

properties.name: solon.cloud.nimbus-conf.config.load
properties.description: nimbus-config 服务加载配置文件列表，逗号分隔 (server配置的key)
